description: classify a Nemotron Speech (Riva) prompt to the right bundled reference (ASR/TTS/NMT)
rules: read-only — pure regex classifier, no deployment, no network, no GPU
emits a single route JSON to record_store
returns route=null when no Riva/Nemotron Speech cue is present (skill stays silent)
usage: Set QUESTION (the user prompt). Output: route.json (route + reference + confidence + next_steps).
limitation: Does not fetch current model catalogs, container IDs, function IDs, voices, or VRAM minimums — the agent must still open the canonical NVIDIA docs for release-specific detail. x86_64-only deployment guidance; self-hosting needs NVAIE, cloud inference needs NVIDIA_API_KEY (the classifier itself needs neither).
